productDisplayName: Little Miss Intimates Women Blue Brief
description: Style NoteFeel like the princess you truly are with these adorable briefs from little miss. These cotton and spandex intimates feature a cute print on the front and an all over dotted print at the back. The cut allows free leg movement, while the printed label offers abrasion-free comfort.
